MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: C. Zadik Shaprio; Clerk: V. Mack; Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff representative David Kim is present.
Attorney, Michael S. Rossoff, Esq., representing the plaintiff, Community Housing Partnership is present.

Defendant Lola Osby is present.
Attorney, Darren Teshima, Esq., representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The case did not settle. The trial date of AUG-10-2009 remains set.
